meaning: n.电影摄影技师,放映技师
examples: He used the same cinematographer, Owen Roizman, to create a dark, intense atmosphere which was very un-American at the time.
Yu is the regular cinematographer of leading director Jia Zhang-ke.
I know I said 'When in Gone Ember,' but this old cinematographer could use a drink.
Bigelow and her cinematographer, Adrian Biddle, establish vivid contrasting looks for the historical and present-day action.
This allows the cinematographer to capture two images simultaneously to give the illusion of depth.
